message:
refactor(codegen): Add emit helpers for float methods and PyValue.fromAlloc

- methods/float.zig: Add emitRuntimeFloatCall, emitSimpleFloatCall,
  emitTryFloatCallWithAlloc, emitParenTryFloatCallWithAlloc helpers
- Simplify genFloor, genCeil, genTrunc, genRound, genHex, genIsInteger
- expressions/calls.zig: Add emitPyValueFromAlloc helper (pub export)
- methods/list.zig: Use emitPyValueFromAlloc in append operations

These helpers encapsulate repeated patterns and guarantee matching parentheses.
